description: Data protection, scam prevention, cybercrime, and digital safety guidelines

cybercrime.purpose: Report all cybercrimes including financial fraud

chakshu.purpose: Report spam calls/SMS and suspected fraud communications

video_references.title: Digital Arrest Scam Awareness (CyberDost, MHA)
video_references.use_when: User asks about scam calls, intimidation fraud, or cyber safety basics

video_references.title: SBI Cycops Cyber Safety Awareness Video
video_references.use_when: User asks about banking fraud prevention or safe digital payments

never_share: Credit/debit card number, CVV, expiry date
UPI PIN or UPI ID password
OTP received on phone (no legitimate entity asks for OTP)
